hero.headline:
You forgot
you have legs.
hero.sub: PromptBreak locks Claude, Cursor and Codex until you stand up and move. Camera-verified. No cheating.

cta.headline:
Stand up.
It'll only take a minute.
cta.sub: Cheaper than the chiropractor you're heading to. Less than your next coffee order. Better for your back than six more hours in the chair.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.sub: Everything you need to know before you buy.

items.a: No. One-time payment. Pay once, use forever, and get all future updates.
Anything you pick: Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Terminal, Codex, Ghostty. If it's a macOS app, PromptBreak can block it.
The camera tracks your actual movement using Apple's Vision framework on-device. You need to complete the real reps — quick gestures won't count.

items.q: Does the camera send video anywhere?
items.a: Never. All pose detection runs locally using Apple Vision. No video ever leaves your Mac.
macOS 14 Sonoma or later, on any Mac with a built-in camera or Continuity Camera (iPhone as webcam).
Email us within 30 days for a full refund, no questions asked.
